_comment: Melaka election metadata. No polling date announced by SPR as of 2026-07-11, but expectations have moved earlier than the legal backstop: the CM signalled (FMT, 6 Jun 2026) dissolution within ~3 months and polls possibly by September 2026, after Johor (11 Jul 2026) and Negeri Sembilan (1 Aug 2026). Legal backstop unchanged: the assembly's five-year term runs from Dec 2021, auto-dissolves 27 Dec 2026, polls due by ~25 Feb 2027. Update polling_date/early_voting_date/nomination_date the day SPR announces, and switch the pipeline's saluran/roll sources to the mlk lake files when they appear.

election.note_bm: Tarikh belum diumumkan — KM menandakan pembubaran dalam ~3 bulan (Jun 2026), PRN mungkin menjelang Sep 2026; batas undang-undang: penggal DUN tamat Dis 2026, pilihan raya selewat-lewatnya akhir Feb 2027.
election.note_en: Date not yet announced — the CM signalled dissolution within ~3 months (Jun 2026), polls possibly by Sept 2026; legal backstop: the assembly's term ends Dec 2026, polls due by late Feb 2027.
